name: Pulsar X2H Mini Gaming Mouse - RRQ Edition - 53g Ultra Lightweight - 1ms Report Rate - 26000 DPI PixArt PAW3395 Sensor - 32-bit Nordic MCU - Optical Switches - 2.4GHz Wireless Adapter (PX2H15)
